# twotower — TwoTower-Sovereign (SSM-context diffusion LM)

A trainable diffusion **block-writer** (denoiser) on top of a **frozen pure-SSM
context tower** (falcon-mamba-7b). Inspired by NVIDIA Nemotron TwoTower
(arXiv 2606.26493) but with a PURE-SSM context tower (novel).

Full plan, phases, and the detailed P1 design: `docs/twotower-sovereign-demo.md`.

## Files
- `prototype.py` — **P1 scaffold**: untrained, end-to-end forward that connects the
  pipes. Mocks the frozen context memory from the falcon-mamba knot dims, runs a
  random-init denoiser through the block-AR loop, and verifies shapes +
  cross-attention wiring + the O(T)-not-O(K) denoise loop. Garbage output by design.
  The noise regime is the repo's **PROVEN, zero-axiom** formalization (not the generic
  MaskGIT placeholder): colored-noise forward (clinamen `+1`, pink→brown spectral
  color, Monster→Grid fold-tower masking) + an **optimal lattice-quantizer** reverse
  (E8 nearest-point, measured 14.1% MSE < cubic; Leech/kaiju 24-D) gated by proven
  energy/topology/harmonic admission. See `docs/twotower-sovereign-demo.md` →
  "## Noise Regime (proven)". Run: `python3 prototype.py` (E8) or
  `python3 prototype.py --lattice leech` (24-D + fork/race/fold channels), CPU, torch 2.10.

## Context (frozen tower)
The frozen falcon-mamba-7b forward lives in
`open-source/gnosis/distributed-inference/src/model_mamba.rs` (Mamba-1 S6, exposes
per-layer hidden `x` + the S6 state `ssm_h`). The fat-station serves it with a
`POST /debug/forward` endpoint (`src/bin/fat-station.rs`) and `/ssm-state/{save,load}`
— the plumbing the P2 context-memory hook reuses.

## P2 training + ablation scripts
- `train_p2_demo.py` — P2 buleyean rejection-only training on a MOCK context (proves the
  loop: recon 0→100%, gates open). `python3 train_p2_demo.py`.
- `train_p2_real.py` — swaps the mock for the REAL frozen mamba-2.8b SSM context (mctx
  canary), N=20 paired prompts, the 3-way real/zero/shuffled ablation.
- `train_p2_scaled.py` — N=251, greedy self-continuation targets; STAGE-1 kernel/1-NN
  probe (4.38× chance) + STAGE-2 34.6M denoiser held-out ablation (data-starved).
- `train_p2_xl.py` — **DECISIVE scaled run**: ~3600 prompts with HONEST real-text corpus
  targets (`corpus_build.py`: prompt = first 6 tokens of repo prose, target = the next 8
  REAL tokens), one mctx context call per prompt (parallel, resumable cache). STAGE-1
  dual probe + STAGE-2 116M denoiser (d_model=1024, 6 layers, 8 heads) 3-way held-out
  ablation with a McNemar significance test. `python3 train_p2_xl.py` (offline, cached);
  `--extract` (re)builds the dataset from the canary. The ~250MB context npz is
  gitignored — rebuild with `--extract` (deterministic corpus + frozen canary).
- `corpus_build.py` — assembles the diverse real-text prompt/continuation pairs from
  `docs/**` + open-source READMEs, tokenized with the gpt-neox/pythia BPE (vocab 50280).

## Status
- [x] P1 — design + untrained forward (this dir).
- [x] P2 — train the denoiser (torch; frozen mamba-2.8b context). STAGE-1 signal PRESENT
  and scales; STAGE-2 parametric reader at its ceiling (see the "Scaled context verdict"
  sections in `docs/twotower-sovereign-demo.md`). The frontier is the reader architecture.
- [ ] P3 — port denoiser forward to the fat-station; measure throughput/quality.
